description: The fallback workflow for authoring custom HyperFrames video compositions at any length or format — longer or multi-scene pieces, brand / sizzle reels, montages, title cards, static loops, and freeform compositions. Input- and length-agnostic. If a specialized workflow clearly fits the input — a marketed product, a website, a topic explainer, a GitHub PR, existing footage, a short motion graphic, or a Remotion port — prefer it (see /hyperframes); use this only as the general fallback when none fit.
representativeQueries: Create a custom video composition for our brand
Make a multi-scene video with title cards and music
Author a video montage with custom transitions
Build a freeform video composition from scratch
Design a branded sizzle reel with multiple scenes
